purpose: Placeholder asset map for the PixiJS office canvas

groups.backgrounds: Office floor, rooms, and environmental art placeholders
groups.characters: Spritesheet and avatar placeholders for Council and interns
groups.snark: Speech bubble, reaction, and office chat placeholders
groups.floor-plan: Room map and layout placeholders for the office viewport
groups.debug: Diagnostic overlays and transport visualization placeholders

notes: This file exists so the public asset tree is tracked before real art lands.
The actual PixiJS runtime will load concrete spritesheets and atlases later.
